pins.title: Bush climb — orchard edge
pins.description: Use the hedge line to vault into the orchard without exposing yourself on the road.

pins.title: Roof access — farmhouse
pins.description: Climb the rubble pile on the south side to get onto the farmhouse roof for overwatch.

pins.title: Wall boost — church approach
pins.description: Two-player boost or solo jump spot to clear the stone wall near the church.
